/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/calstat.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcalstat.so -o libcalstat.so CMakeFiles/calstat.dir/calstat_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calstat.dir/calstat.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libvector/math_vector:" ../../libvector/math_vector/libmath_vector.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
